details.pattern: Fix A: addMutation persist + Fix B: handleEdit reconciliation
details.note: Added electron-store persist after sdk.client.mcp.add() in addMutation; added stub entry fallback in handleEdit when server exists in sync but not in store

details.pattern: Fix C: Remove nested dialog portal
details.note: Removed useDialog() and <Dialog> wrapper, rendering as inline panel. Parent controls visibility via editingEntry signal.
Updated validateAndFilterMcpServers to return {servers, dropped}; updated IPC handler with try-catch and result return

details.pattern: Fix D: Update setMcpServers return type
details.note: Changed return type to Promise<{servers: unknown[]; dropped: number}>
Tests for isValidMcpEntry and validateAndFilterMcpServers covering edge cases and dropped count
